category_sources: Official README describes Xeol as a scanner for EOL packages in container images, filesystems, and SBOMs.
source_facts.description says xeol scans end-of-life software in container images, filesystems, and SBOMs.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading uses Xeol.
source_facts.name provides the package id xeol.
docs_sources: Official README is the reliable documentation surface; linked docs.xeol.io path currently resolves to a 404 page.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already provided; per instruction, repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: Official README topics and usage describe EOL scanning, SBOM input, compliance/security context.
